texts.Features:Description:EnableBlobManagemen: Enable to give the application the ability to have an blob storage module.
texts.Features:Description:PublicAccess: Whether to allow unauthorized users to access public directories
texts.Features:Description:EnableBlob: Enable to allow the application to access the blob storage
texts.Features:Description:DownloadFile: Whether to allow users to download files
texts.Features:Description:DownloadLimit: Limits the total number of times a file is downloaded within a specified period
texts.Features:Description:DownloadInterval: The update period that limits the number of files downloaded. The time scale is: month. Default: 1
texts.Features:Description:UploadFile: Whether to allow users to upload files
texts.Features:Description:UploadLimit: Limits the total number of file uploads within a specified period
texts.Features:Description:UploadInterval: The update period that limits the number of files uploaded. The time scale is: month. Default: 1
texts.BlobManagement:001001: A blob container named {Name} already exists!
texts.BlobManagement:001002: The blob container is not empty and cannot be deleted!
texts.BlobManagement:001003: The blob container is the system container and cannot be deleted!
texts.BlobManagement:001004: There is no blob container named {Name}!
texts.BlobManagement:002001: Sub-files/directories cannot be added to non-directory types!
texts.BlobManagement:002002: There is already a file/directory named {Name} in the current directory!
texts.BlobManagement:002003: The current directory is not empty and cannot be deleted!
texts.BlobManagement:002005: File fingerprint verification failed. Please check the file's legitimacy!
texts.BlobManagement:002006: Upload file size cannot exceed {Limit} MB!
texts.Description:FileLimitLength: Limit size of uploaded file in MB
texts.Description:AllowFileExtensions: List of allowed extensions to upload files, with multiple extensions separated by, don't need a notation
texts.DisplayName:Name: Name
texts.BlobWellDownloadMessage: The file download is about to start.
texts.BlobCanNotPreviewMessage: This file does not support previewing. Please download it and view it!
